title: Senior Frontend Engineer & Team Lead
summary: Led and built the core user-facing frontend applications of a real-time streaming platform, with deep ownership across Vue.js architecture, design-system implementation, and WebSocket-driven interaction systems.
highlights: Built real-time streaming web applications for performers and end-users using React with SSR on Next.js.
Optimized site performance with asset compression, WebP conversion pipelines, and adaptive streaming support.
Implemented Azure-based video processing functions and Python backend jobs.
Architected chat, presence, notifications, and digital tipping flows using WebSockets and event-driven patterns.
manual_highlights: Built two core user-facing streaming applications in Vue.js that formed the frontend backbone of the platform.
Implemented demanding frontend experiences from professional Figma design specifications with strong attention to design fidelity and usability.
Used Storybook as a design-system layer to centralize, standardize, and control component styling across the platform.
Improved frontend delivery performance by introducing HTTP/2, asset compression, and image conversion to WebP format.
Designed and implemented an SEO-focused rendering solution that served server-side-rendered content to web crawlers while preserving the SPA experience for regular users.
Contributed deeply to WebSocket-based communication patterns and created abstractions for real-time interaction features.
Architected critical real-time systems including the interactive chat experience.
Worked in Linux environments while building and operating streaming platform systems.
Used Redis as a non-relational data store for the in-app chat system.
Served as team leader for frontend and platform delivery work.
Acted as scrum master, coordinating team execution and agile delivery processes.

manual_notes.note: User confirmed Linux experience at Broadcasting Platforms.
Used Redis as a non-relational database as part of the in-app chat system.
Also served as team leader and scrum master at Broadcasting Platforms.

Built two core user-facing applications of the streaming platform in Vue.js. Worked from professional Figma designs with strong design requirements and used Storybook as a design system to centralize and control styling. Also contributed deeply to WebSocket-based communication, created coding abstractions, and architected critical real-time systems such as the interactive chat.
Contributed deeply to page optimization by introducing HTTP/2, assets compression, and conversion of images to WebP format.

Contributed deeply to SEO optimization by implementing a creative rendering strategy for an SPA: crawlers received server-side-rendered page content while regular users continued receiving the SPA application.

source.notes: Parsed from JOSE BANDE SERRANO RESUME V6.pdf
